context: The agent has a complete batch run directory and must generate the final summary report. This tests whether the agent uses summarize-batch.py (not custom markdown generation), whether the resulting index.md has the required schema sections, and whether the absolute path is reported.

checklist.name: summarize-batch.py invoked
checklist.description: summary-log.txt references skills/batch-driver/scripts/summarize-batch.py being called with the run directory path (not a custom script or manual report writing)

checklist.name: index.md exists in run dir
checklist.description: A file named index.md exists at runs/2026-05-12T-snyk-users/index.md

checklist.name: Absolute path reported
checklist.description: summary-log.txt contains an absolute path to index.md (path starting with /) as the output location

checklist.name: Verdict counts in index.md
checklist.description: index.md contains a section or lines listing counts for BUILD, SKIP, and AMBIGUOUS verdicts as separate labelled values

checklist.name: Per-company table in index.md
checklist.description: index.md contains a markdown table or structured list showing each company name and its verdict

checklist.name: Aggregate lift section present
checklist.description: index.md includes an aggregate lift section showing median or mean lift values (Cloud Nexus and Synthwave Labs both have lift.json data)

checklist.name: Follow-up checklist in index.md
checklist.description: index.md contains a follow-up section listing Datastream Analytics (SKIP) and Polaris AI (AMBIGUOUS) as requiring manual attention

checklist.name: Batch ID/timestamp in header
checklist.description: index.md begins with a header containing the batch ID or run timestamp (2026-05-12T-snyk-users)

checklist.name: Total company count in header
checklist.description: index.md header line includes the total number of companies in the batch (4)

checklist.name: Report link for BUILD companies
checklist.description: index.md per-company table includes links to report.md for at least one of the BUILD companies (Cloud Nexus or Synthwave Labs) that have a report file
